package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gin_handler_returns_persistence_model_directly: Handlers that serialize database models directly to the client instead of mapping to response DTOs.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule048NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule048NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule048NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario048Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule048NegativeService, input Rule048NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
